description: Search for pubs near Haymarket station accommodating 6 people within a £800 budget.
success_criterion: venue_search returns at least one venue option.

description: Check weather forecast for Edinburgh on April 25, 2026.
success_criterion: weather data retrieved successfully for the specified date.

description: Calculate total event cost for the selected venue with 6 people, 3 hours, and bar snacks catering.
success_criterion: cost calculation returns a valid total amount.

description: Generate HTML event flyer using event details from previous steps.
success_criterion: flyer.html is created in the workspace directory.

description: Mark task as complete with the generated flyer path.
success_criterion: task completion confirmed with flyer file path.
